prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约12790名、13380名、11108名、28501名（含特殊类型专业组拉低）、10571名。剔除2024年特殊组后，近4年正常位次在1057 1–13380之间波动，2025年基准约10571名，较2023年小幅前移；该校在广西物理类招生计划持续扩招：2021年23人、2022年24人、2023年24人、2024年27人、20 25年29人；2026年计划增至31人，较2025年扩招2人，增幅约6.9%，扩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第62名 ，近年排名在48–62之间波动，整体处于中上水平；该校近年声誉平稳，无明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音平台热度一般，未进入高校热度前100名，报考关 注度适中。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校以石油石化类工科为主，相关专业大类（化工、地质、 材料等）社会热度偏冷，计算机、电子信息等热门专业招生名额有限；广西2026年物理类考生估算约26.4万人，较2025年增加约1.45%，考生规模扩大使竞争略有上升；省控线（ 本科批）2024年371分、2025年370分，基本持平；校本部位于北京，属跨省就读；该校在广西招生占比约2.1%–3.7%（2025年约2.17%），占比不高，地域偏好影 响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10571名、2026年计划扩招2人（+6.9%）、物理类考生增加约1.45%以及学校排名小幅波动等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025 年小幅后移。预测最低位次约11039名，区间10539–11539名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 石油工程（含未来能源创新班）
- 新能源科学与工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化）
- 油气储运工程
- 自动化
- 能源与动力工程
- 电子信息工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化工与制药类（化学工程与工艺、能源化学工程）
- 应用化学
- 材料科学与工程
- 地质类/资源勘查工程/勘查技术与工程
- 储能科学与工程
- 人工智能。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10539–11539名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档传统工科保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<10539名）可重点冲击计算机科学与技术、石油工 程等一档专业；位次接近区间下限（>11539名）建议以三档专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 12790, 13380, 11108, 28501 (pulled down by a special type major group), and 10571. Excluding the 2024 special group, the normal rankings in the past 4 years fluctuated between 10571 and 13380. The 2025 baseline is about 10571, slightly moving forward compared to 2023. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi has been continuously expanding: 23 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 27 in 2024, 29 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 31, an increase of 2 students compared to 2025, with a growth rate of about 6.9%, making competition slightly more intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 48 and 62 in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its popularity on Douyin is average, not entering the top 100 in university popularity, with moderate application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university focuses mainly on petroleum and petrochemical engineering majors, with related major categories (chemical engineering, geology, materials, etc.) being relatively unpopular socially. Popular majors like computer science and electronic information have limited enrollment quotas. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Guangxi in 2026 is about 264,000, an increase of about 1.45% compared to 2025, making competition slightly more intense. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 371 in 2024 and 370 in 2025, basically unchanged. The main campus is located in Beijing, requiring cross-province study. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.1%–3.7% (about 2.17% in 2025), which is not high, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10571, the 2026 plan to expand enrollment by 2 students (+6.9%), the increase in Physics Category examinees by about 1.45%, and minor fluctuations in the university's ranking, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 11039, with a range of 10539–11539.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Petroleum Engineering (including Future Energy Innovation Class)
- New Energy Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Class (Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation)
- Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering
- Automation
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Electronic Information Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Energy Chemical Engineering)
- Applied Chemistry
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Geology Class / Resource Exploration Engineering / Exploration Technology and Engineering
- Energy Storage Science and Engineering
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10539–11539, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 traditional engineering majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<10539), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Petroleum Engineering. If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>11539), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
